Target State: Documented conformance with test evidence and remediation log

Current State: Many labels and ARIA attributes present
Target State: Validated screen-reader experience for key workflows

Requirement or Goal: Respect user preference for reduced motion
Target State: Verify all animations and transitions meet preference
